questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家计划迁移到 AWS 云的公司位于网络连接有限的偏远地区。公司需要在本地进行数据处理。该公司需要一种无需稳定的网络连接即可运行的解决方案。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company that is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud is based in an isolated area that has limited internet connectivity. The company needs to perform local data processing on premises. The company needs a solution that can operate without a stable internet connection. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon S3
A.en: Amazon S3

B.zh: AWS Snowball Edge
B.en: AWS Snowball Edge

C.zh: AWS Storage Gateway
C.en: AWS Storage Gateway

D.zh: AWS Backup
D.en: AWS Backup

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一种云存储服务，需要稳定的网络连接才能访问和操作数据。由于此题需要解决网络连接受限的问题，Amazon S3 不符合要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a cloud storage service that requires a stable Internet connection to access and manipulate data. Since the question requires solving the problem of limited Internet connectivity, Amazon S3 does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Snowball Edge 是一种数据迁移和边缘计算设备，支持本地数据处理，无需稳定的网络连接即可运行。完全符合题目的要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a data migration and edge computing device that supports local data processing and can operate without a stable internet connection. It fully meets the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Storage Gateway 是一种混合云存储服务，通常需要稳定的网络连接才能将本地数据同步到云。它不适合在网络连接有限的情况下使用。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a hybrid cloud storage service that typically requires a stable internet connection to synchronize local data to the cloud. It is not suitable for use with limited internet connection.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Backup 是一种集中式备份服务，主要用于云环境中的数据备份。它需要稳定的网络连接才能运行，不符合问题要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a centralized backup service mainly used for data backup in cloud environments. It requires a stable internet connection to operate and does not meet the question requirements.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Snowball Edge 是一种数据迁移和边缘计算设备，支持本地数据处理，无需稳定的网络连接即可运行。完全符合题目的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a data migration and edge computing device that supports local data processing and can operate without a stable internet connection. It fully meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要创建图形查询以进行实时欺诈模式检测。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to build graph queries for real-time fraud pattern detection. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: Amazon Neptune
A.en: Amazon Neptune

B.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
B.en: Amazon DynamoDB

C.zh: Amazon Timestream
C.en: Amazon Timestream

D.zh: Amazon Forecast
D.en: Amazon Forecast

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Neptune 是一项托管图形数据库服务，专为处理图形数据而设计。它支持Gremlin和SPARQL等图查询语言，使其非常适合实时图查询，例如侦测诈骗模式。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Neptune is a managed graph database service designed specifically for processing graph data. It supports graph query languages ​​such as Gremlin and SPARQL, making it ideal for real-time graph queries, such as detecting fraud patterns.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一种高性能 NoSQL 数据库，适用于键值和文档存储，但不专门支持图形查询或图形数据库功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon DynamoDB is a high-performance NoSQL database suitable for key-value and document storage, but does not specifically support graph queries or graph database capabilities.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Timestream 是时间序列数据库，主要用于存储和分析时间序列数据，例如物联网数据或应用程序性能监控数据，不适合图形查询。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Timestream is a time series database mainly used to store and analyze time series data, such as IoT data or application performance monitoring data, and is not suitable for graph queries.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Forecast 是一项基于机器学习的预测服务，用于时间序列预测，例如销售预测或库存管理，并且不支持图形查询。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Forecast is a machine learning-based forecasting service for time series forecasting, such as sales forecasting or inventory management, and does not support graph queries.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Neptune 是一项托管图形数据库服务，专为处理图形数据而设计。它支持Gremlin和SPARQL等图查询语言，使其非常适合实时图查询，例如侦测诈骗模式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Neptune is a managed graph database service designed specifically for processing graph data. It supports graph query languages ​​such as Gremlin and SPARQL, making it ideal for real-time graph queries, such as detecting fraud patterns.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要迁移到 AWS 云。公司需要有在需要资源时获取资源的能力。公司还需要能够在不再需要这些资源时释放这些资源。 AWS 云的哪一种架构概念符合这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company needs the ability to acquire resources when the resources are necessary. The company also needs the ability to release those resources when the resources are no longer necessary. Which architecture concept of the AWS Cloud meets these requirements?

A.zh: 弹性
A.en: Elasticity

B.zh: 可用性
B.en: Availability

C.zh: 可靠性
C.en: Reliability

D.zh: 耐用性
D.en: Durability

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：弹性是AWS的核心特性之一，让用户可以根据需求动态调整资源。标题提到「需要时获取资源，不需要时释放资源」，这就是弹性的定义。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Elasticity is one of the core features of AWS, allowing users to dynamically adjust resources according to needs. The title mentioned that "resources need to be acquired when necessary and released when not needed", which is the definition of elasticity.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可用性是指系统始终正常运行的能力，与动态调整资源无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Availability refers to the system's ability to run normally at all times, and has nothing to do with dynamically adjusting resources.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可靠性是指系统在故障情况下继续运行的能力，与资源的动态调整没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Reliability refers to the system's ability to continue operating under fault conditions and is not directly related to the dynamic adjustment of resources.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：持久性是指数据在存储中长期存储的能力，与资源的动态调整无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Durability refers to the ability of data to be preserved in storage for a long time and has nothing to do with the dynamic adjustment of resources.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：弹性是AWS的核心特性之一，让用户可以根据需求动态调整资源。标题提到「需要时获取资源，不需要时释放资源」，这就是弹性的定义。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Elasticity is one of the core features of AWS, allowing users to dynamically adjust resources according to needs. The title mentioned that "resources need to be acquired when necessary and released when not needed", which is the definition of elasticity.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要将 Web 应用程序部署为容器化应用程序。该公司希望使用托管服务，可以自动从原始代码创建容器映像并部署容器化应用程序。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy a web application as a containerized application. The company wants to use a managed service that can automatically create container images from source code and deploy the containerized application. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
A.en: AWS Elastic Beanstalk

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
B.en: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

C.zh: AWS App Runner
C.en: AWS App Runner

D.zh: Amazon EC2
D.en: Amazon EC2

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Elastic Beanstalk 是一个支持应用程序部署和管理的平台即服务 (PaaS)，但它不是专门为容器化应用编程的，无法从原始代码自动创建容器映像。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Elastic Beanstalk is a platform as a service (PaaS) that supports the deployment and management of applications, but it is not specifically designed for containerized applications and cannot automatically create container images from source code. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ECS 是一种容器编排服务，可以运行和管理容器化应用程序，但它需要用户手动创建容器映像并定义任务配置，并且无法从原始代码自动创建容器映像。因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service that can run and manage containerized applications, but it requires users to manually create container images and define task configurations, and cannot automatically create container images from source code. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS App Runner 是一项完全托管的服务，旨在从原始代码或容器映像自动构建和部署容器化应用程序。符合题目要求，故因此符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a fully managed service designed to automatically build and deploy containerized applications from source code or container images. It meets the question requirements, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EC2 是一种提供虚拟服务器的基础设施即服务（IaaS），但它不具备自动创建容器镜像或部署容器化应用程序的功能。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) that provides virtual servers, but it does not have the functionality to automatically create container images or deploy containerized applications. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (83%) B (17%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS App Runner 是一项完全托管的服务，旨在从原始代码或容器映像自动构建和部署容器化应用程序。符合题目要求，故因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (83%) B (17%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a fully managed service designed to automatically build and deploy containerized applications from source code or container images. It meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司已将所有基础设施迁移到 AWS 云。为了提前规划每个季度，财务团队希望追踪前几个月所有资源的成本和使用数据。财务团队希望自动生成包含数据的报告。财务团队应使用哪种 AWS 服务或功能来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has moved all its infrastructure to the AWS Cloud. To plan ahead for each quarter, the finance team wants to track the cost and usage data of all resources from previous months. The finance team wants to automatically generate reports that contains the data. Which AWS service or feature should the finance team use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Detective
A.en: Amazon Detective

B.zh: AWS Pricing Calculator
B.en: AWS Pricing Calculator

C.zh: AWS Budgets
C.en: AWS Budgets

D.zh: AWS 节省计划
D.en: AWS Savings Plans

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Detective 是一种安全服务，用于分析、调查和识别潜在的安全问题。它与成本管理无关，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a security service used to analyze, investigate, and identify potential security issues. It has nothing to do with cost management, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Pricing Calculator 是一种用于估算未来 AWS 服务成本的工具，但它无法追踪过去的成本和使用数据，也无法生成报告。因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool for estimating future AWS service costs, but it cannot track past cost and usage data, nor can it generate reports. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Budgets 是一种成本管理工具，可让您追踪成本和使用情况，并设置超出预算前的警报。它还可以生成满足题目要求的报告。因此该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a cost management tool that allows you to track costs and usage, and set pre-bump alerts. It can also generate reports to meet the topic requirements. Therefore this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 节省计划是一种通过用量承诺降低计算成本的定价模式，不会生成历史成本和使用情况报告。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a cost-saving pricing model used to optimize the cost of billing services, but it does not generate reports on cost and usage data. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Budgets 是一种成本管理工具，可让您追踪成本和使用情况，并设置超出预算前的警报。它还可以生成满足题目要求的报告。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a cost management tool that allows you to track costs and usage, and set pre-bump alerts. It can also generate reports to meet the topic requirements. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) 的哪个观点着重于实时洞察并回答有关策略的问题？
question_text.en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspective focuses on real-time insights and answers questions about strategy?

A.zh: 操作
A.en: Operations

B.zh: 人
B.en: People

C.zh: 业务
C.en: Business

D.zh: 平台
D.en: Platform

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：运维观点着重于如何管理和优化云环境的日常运营，包括监控、事件响应和持续改善。它没有解决战略问题，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The operations perspective focuses on how to manage and optimize the day-to-day operations of a cloud environment, including monitoring, incident response, and continuous improvement. It does not address strategic issues, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：人员视角着重于组织中的人员和文化转型，例如训练、技能提升和角色分配。它不直接解决战略问题，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The people perspective focuses on people and culture transformation in an organization, such as training, upskilling, and role assignments. It does not directly address strategic issues, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：业务视角重点在于组织的策略目标、财务绩效以及如何通过云技术实现业务价值。它确实涉及战略问题和实时洞察，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The business perspective focuses on the organization's strategic goals, financial performance, and how to realize business value through cloud technology. It does involve strategic issues and real-time insights, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：平台视角着重于技术架构、设计和部署的最佳实践。它没有解决战略问题，因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The platform perspective focuses on best practices for technology architecture, design, and deployment. It does not address strategic issues, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：业务视角重点在于组织的策略目标、财务绩效以及如何通过云技术实现业务价值。它确实涉及战略问题和实时洞察，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The business perspective focuses on the organization's strategic goals, financial performance, and how to realize business value through cloud technology. It does involve strategic issues and real-time insights, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将关键的本地生产系统迁移到 Amazon EC2 实例。生产实例的使用期限至少为3年。该公司希望有一个能够最大限度降低成本的定价选项。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate critical on-premises production systems to Amazon EC2 instances. The production instances will be used for at least 3 years. The company wants a pricing option that will minimize cost. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 按需型实例
A.en: On-Demand Instances

B.zh: 预留实例
B.en: Reserved Instances

C.zh: 竞价型实例
C.en: Spot Instances

D.zh: AWS 免费套餐
D.en: AWS Free Tier

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：按需型实例不需要长期承诺，适合短期或不可预测的工作负载，但持续三年的关键生产系统通常不会获得预留实例的长期折扣。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: On-Demand Instances require no long-term commitment and are suitable for short-term or unpredictable workloads, but critical production systems that last three years typically do not receive the long-term discounts for Reserved Instances.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：适合长期使用场景，用户可以承诺使用1年或3年，以获得显著的成本节省。符合问题要求，因为该公司计划使用至少3年，并希望降低成本。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: are suitable for long-term usage scenarios, and users can commit to using them for 1 or 3 years to obtain significant cost savings. It meets the question requirements because the company plans to use it for at least 3 years and hopes to reduce costs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：高端实例适合灵活的工作负载，因为它们价格便宜，但可能随时中断。它不适合关键生产，因为生产要求品质和可靠性。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Premium instances are suitable for flexible workloads because they are cheap but can be disrupted at any time. It is not suitable for critical production, because production requires quality and reliability.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 免费方案仅适用于新用户，并且有使用限制（例如，免费套餐仅在有限的时间内支持特定实例类型）。不适合长期使用产生痘痘，所以不符合题目的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS Free Tier is only available to new users and has usage restrictions (e.g. the Free Tier only supports specific instance types and for a limited time). It is not suitable for long-term use to produce acne, so it does not meet the requirements of the question.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：来源未提供投票比例。热门讨论与考点摘要：适合长期使用场景，用户可以承诺使用1年或3年，以获得显著的成本节省。符合问题要求，因为该公司计划使用至少3年，并希望降低成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Reserved Instances suit predictable, long-running EC2 workloads and provide substantial discounts compared with On-Demand Instances through a one- or three-year commitment.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS Well-Architected Framework 中的哪个概念表示系统在遇到运营问题时仍能保持正常运行？
question_text.en: Which AWS Well-Architected Framework concept represents a system's ability to remain functional when the system encounters operational problems?

A.zh: 一致性
A.en: Consistency

B.zh: 弹性
B.en: Elasticity

C.zh: 持久性
C.en: Durability

D.zh: 延迟
D.en: Latency

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：一致性通常表示多个数据副本保持同步，与系统在运营问题期间维持功能无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: generally refers to the ability of data to remain synchronized across multiple storage copies and has nothing to do with the system maintaining functionality when encountering operational problems.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：弹性表示根据需求自动增加或减少资源的能力，与题目所述概念不同。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Resilience refers to the system's ability to automatically expand or contract resources as needed, and has nothing to do with the system maintaining functionality when encountering operational problems.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：持久性表示系统在遇到运营问题时仍能保持功能并保护数据，符合题目描述。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: refers to the ability of a system to maintain functionality and protect data in the face of operational problems. This is the exact answer to the question description.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：延迟表示系统响应请求所需的时间，与系统在运营问题期间维持功能无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to how quickly the system responds and has nothing to do with the system remaining functional when encountering operational problems. Due to the wrong cup options.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：持久性表示系统在遇到运营问题时仍能保持功能并保护数据，符合题目描述。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: refers to the ability of a system to maintain functionality and protect data in the face of operational problems. This is the exact answer to the question description.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS Well-Architected Framework的哪个支柱着重于从服务中断中自动恢复的能力？
question_text.en: Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework focuses on the ability to recover automatically from service interruptions?

A.zh: 安全
A.en: Security

B.zh: 性能效率
B.en: Performance efficiency

C.zh: 卓越运营
C.en: Operational excellence

D.zh: 可靠性
D.en: Reliability

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全支柱着重于保护数据、系统和资产，主要涉及访问控制、数据加密等，与服务中断的自动恢复无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The security pillar focuses on protecting data, systems, and assets, mainly involving access control, data encryption, etc., and has nothing to do with automatic recovery of service interruptions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：性能效率支柱着重于资源的优化使用和性能改进，与从服务中断中恢复的能力无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The performance efficiency pillar focuses on the optimal use of resources and performance improvements, regardless of the ability to recover from service interruptions.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：卓越运营支柱着重于运维流程的优化和自动化，但不直接涉及从服务中断中自动恢复的能力。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The operational excellence pillar focuses on the optimization and automation of operational processes but does not directly involve the ability to automatically recover from service outages.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：可靠性支柱着重于系统在故障时恢复的能力，包括自动恢复、故障侦测和设计高可用性架构。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: The reliability pillar focuses on the system's ability to recover in the face of failure, including automated recovery, fault detection, and designing a high-availability architecture.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：可靠性支柱着重于系统在故障时恢复的能力，包括自动恢复、故障侦测和设计高可用性架构。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The reliability pillar focuses on the system's ability to recover in the face of failure, including automated recovery, fault detection, and designing a high-availability architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在数据中心拥有多个基于 SQL 的数据库。公司需要将所有数据库服务器迁移到AWS云上，以降低物理服务器的运维成本。哪种 AWS 服务或资源能够以最少的运维开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has multiple SQL-based databases located in a data center. The company needs to migrate all database servers to the AWS Cloud to reduce the cost of operating physical servers. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: Amazon EC2 实例
A.en: Amazon EC2 instances

B.zh: Amazon RDS
B.en: Amazon RDS

C.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
C.en: Amazon DynamoDB

D.zh: 打开搜索
D.en: OpenSearch

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在 EC2 上运行 SQL 数据库仍需自行安装、备份、修补和监控数据库，因此运维开销高于 Amazon RDS。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Running SQL databases on EC2 requires installing, backing up, patching, and monitoring the databases, resulting in more operational overhead than Amazon RDS.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是一种托管数据库服务，支持多种 SQL 数据库（例如 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQL Server）。它会自动处理数据库管理任务（例如备份、修补程序管理、监控等）并大幅降低运维开销，使其成为最佳选择。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a managed database service that supports multiple SQL databases (such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server). It automatically handles database management tasks (such as backup, patch management, monitoring, etc.) and significantly reduces operational overhead, making it the best choice.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是NoSQL数据库服务，不适合SQL数据库迁移场景。因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a NoSQL database service and is not suitable for SQL database migration scenarios. Therefore it does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项 主要用于搜索和分析数据，而不是运行 SQL 数据库。因此它不适合迁移SQL数据库。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is primarily used for searching and analyzing data, rather than running SQL databases. Therefore it is not suitable for migrating SQL databases.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：来源未提供投票比例。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS 是一种托管数据库服务，支持多种 SQL 数据库（例如 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQL Server）。它会自动处理数据库管理任务（例如备份、修补程序管理、监控等）并大幅降低运维开销，使其成为最佳选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon RDS is a managed relational database service that supports multiple SQL engines and automates administration such as backups, patching, and monitoring.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要构建、训练和部署机器学习 (ML) 模型。公司可以使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to build, train, and deploy machine learning (ML) models. Which AWS service can the company use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: Amazon Personalize
A.en: Amazon Personalize

B.zh: Amazon Comprehend
B.en: Amazon Comprehend

C.zh: Amazon Forecast
C.en: Amazon Forecast

D.zh: Amazon SageMaker
D.en: Amazon SageMaker

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Personalize 是一项用于创建个人化推荐系统的服务，专注于推荐算法的实现，而不是一般的机器学习模型构建、训练和部署。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service for building personalized recommendation systems that focuses on the implementation of recommendation algorithms rather than general machine learning model construction, training, and deployment. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Comprehend 是一种自然语言处理 (NLP) 服务，用于分析文本数据，例如情绪分析和实体识别。它不支持构建、训练和部署通用 ML 模型，因此此选项是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a natural language processing (NLP) service for analyzing text data, such as sentiment analysis and entity recognition. It does not support building, training, and deploying general-purpose ML models, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Forecast 是一项时间序列预测服务，专注于预测任务，而不是一般的机器学习模型构建、训练和部署。因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service for time series forecasting that focuses on forecasting tasks rather than general machine learning model building, training, and deployment. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon SageMaker 是一项专门为构建、训练和部署机器学习模型而设计的服务。它提供了全面的工具链支持，所以该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a service designed specifically for building, training, and deploying machine learning models. It provides comprehensive toolchain support, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon SageMaker 是一项专门为构建、训练和部署机器学习模型而设计的服务。它提供了全面的工具链支持，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service designed specifically for building, training, and deploying machine learning models. It provides comprehensive toolchain support, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务或工具提供建议来协助用户根据历史工作负载使用数据取得合理调整大小的 Amazon EC2 实例？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or tool provides recommendations to help users get rightsized Amazon EC2 instances based on historical workload usage data?

A.zh: AWS Pricing Calculator
A.en: AWS Pricing Calculator

B.zh: AWS Compute Optimizer
B.en: AWS Compute Optimizer

C.zh: AWS App Runner
C.en: AWS App Runner

D.zh: AWS Systems Manager
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Pricing Calculator 是一种用于估算 AWS 服务成本的工具，但它不提供基于历史工作负载数据的 EC2 实例优化建议。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool for estimating the cost of AWS services, but it does not provide EC2 instance optimization recommendations based on historical workload data.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Compute Optimizer 是一项专门设计用于分析历史工作负载数据并提供优化建议（包括建议适当的 EC2 实例类型）的服务。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Compute Optimizer is a service specifically designed to analyze historical workload data and provide optimization recommendations, including recommending appropriate EC2 instance types.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS App Runner 是一项用于快速部署和运行容器化应用程序的服务，但它与 EC2 实例优化无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS App Runner is a service for quickly deploying and running containerized applications, but it has nothing to do with EC2 instance optimization.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Systems Manager 是用于集中管理 AWS 资源的管理工具，但它不提供 EC2 实例优化建议。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Systems Manager is a management tool used to centrally manage AWS resources, but it does not provide EC2 instance optimization recommendations.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Compute Optimizer 是一项专门设计用于分析历史工作负载数据并提供优化建议（包括建议适当的 EC2 实例类型）的服务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Compute Optimizer is a service specifically designed to analyze historical workload data and provide optimization recommendations, including recommending appropriate EC2 instance types.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用编程语言来探索和分析 Amazon S3 中的数据。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to explore and analyze data in Amazon S3 by using a programming language. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Kendra
A.en: Amazon Kendra

B.zh: Amazon Athena
B.en: Amazon Athena

C.zh: Amazon Comprehend
C.en: Amazon Comprehend

D.zh: Amazon SageMaker
D.en: Amazon SageMaker

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Kendra 是一项智能搜索服务，创建搜索功能，帮助用户快速找到信息。它不适合直接分析存储在Amazon S3中的数据，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an intelligent search service that builds search capabilities to help users find information quickly. It is not suitable for directly analyzing data stored in Amazon S3, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Athena 是一项交互式查询服务，可让用户使用 SQL 直接查询存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。它非常适合数据探索和分析，因此符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is an interactive query service that allows users to directly query data stored in Amazon S3 using SQL. It is well suited for data exploration and analysis, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Comprehend 是一种自然语言处理服务，用于分析文本数据的情绪、关键字等。虽然它可以分析文本数据，但它并不是专门为探索和分析 Amazon S3 中存储的数据而设计的，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a natural language processing service used to analyze sentiment, keywords, etc. of text data. Although it can analyze text data, it is not specifically designed to explore and analyze data stored in Amazon S3, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SageMaker 是一项用于构建、训练和部署机器学习模型的机器学习服务。虽然它可以处理数据，但它并不是专门为直接探索和分析 Amazon S3 中存储的数据而设计的，因此此选项是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a machine learning service for building, training, and deploying machine learning models. While it can process data, it is not specifically designed to directly explore and analyze data stored in Amazon S3, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Athena 是一项交互式查询服务，可让用户使用 SQL 直接查询存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。它非常适合数据探索和分析，因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is an interactive query service that allows users to directly query data stored in Amazon S3 using SQL. It is well suited for data exploration and analysis, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在 Amazon EC2 实例上不间断地运行应用程序。哪种 EC2 实例购买选项能够最经济且高效地满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to run an application on Amazon EC2 instances without interruption. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 标准预留实例
A.en: Standard Reserved Instances

B.zh: 可转换预留实例
B.en: Convertible Reserved Instances

C.zh: 按需型实例
C.en: On-Demand Instances

D.zh: 竞价型实例
D.en: Spot Instances

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：标准预留实例可大幅节省成本，适合长期稳定的工作负载。它们保证实例可用性不会因价格波动或资源不足而中断，这使它们成为无中断操作的最合适选择。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Standard Reserved Instances provide significant cost savings and are suitable for long-term stable workloads. They guarantee instance availability without interruption due to price fluctuations or insufficient resources, making them the most suitable option for non-disruptive operation.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可转换预留实例提供更大的实例属性变更灵活性，但折扣通常低于标准预留实例；题目要求不中断且成本最低，因此标准预留实例更合适。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Convertible Reserved Instances offer more flexibility to change instance attributes but generally provide a smaller discount than Standard Reserved Instances, so Standard Reserved Instances are more cost-effective for an uninterrupted workload.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：按需型实例提供灵活性，但价格更高，并且更适合短期或不可预测的工作负载，而不是长期无中断的场景。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-demand instances provide flexibility but are more expensive and are better suited for short-term or unpredictable workloads rather than long-term non-disruptive scenarios.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：竞价型实例的成本最低，但它们可能会因价格波动或资源不足而中断，这使得它们不适合需要无中断操作的用例。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Spot Instances are the lowest cost, but they can be disrupted due to price fluctuations or insufficient resources, making them unsuitable for use cases that require non-disruptive operation.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (73%) A (27%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：标准预留实例可大幅节省成本，适合长期稳定的工作负载。它们保证实例可用性不会因价格波动或资源不足而中断，这使它们成为无中断操作的最合适选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (73%) A (27%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Standard Reserved Instances provide significant cost savings and are suitable for long-term stable workloads. They guarantee instance availability without interruption due to price fluctuations or insufficient resources, making them the most suitable option for non-disruptive operation.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要一项完全托管的服务，能够集中并自动化跨​​ AWS 服务和混合工作负载的数据保护。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants a fully managed service that centralizes and automates data protection across AWS services and hybrid workloads. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Artifact
A.en: AWS Artifact

B.zh: AWS Backup
B.en: AWS Backup

C.zh: AWS Batch
C.en: AWS Batch

D.zh: AWS Shield
D.en: AWS Shield

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Artifact 是一项提供对 AWS 合规性报告和协议的访问的服务。主要用于合规和审计，不涉及数据保护或备份功能。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service that provides access to AWS compliance reports and protocols. It is primarily used for compliance and auditing and does not involve data protection or backup functions. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Backup 是一项完全托管的服务，用于集中式和自动化的数据保护，支持多种 AWS 服务和混合工作负载。这正是题目要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a fully managed service for centralized and automated data protection, supporting multiple AWS services and mixed workloads. This is exactly the function required by the question, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Batch 是一项完全托管的批量计算服务，用于运行与数据保护或备份无关的批量计算任务。因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a fully managed batch computing service for running batch computing tasks that has nothing to do with data protection or backup. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield 是一种托管分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) 保护服务，用于保护应用程序免受 DDoS 攻击，与数据保护或备份无关。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a managed distributed denial of service (DDoS) protection service for protecting applications from DDoS attacks and has nothing to do with data protection or backup. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Backup 是一项完全托管的服务，用于集中式和自动化的数据保护，支持多种 AWS 服务和混合工作负载。这正是题目要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a fully managed service for centralized and automated data protection, supporting multiple AWS services and mixed workloads. This is exactly the function required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司计划将其应用程序从本地迁移到 AWS 云。公司需要收集应用程序组件的使用和配置数据。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to migrate its application from on premises to the AWS Cloud. The company needs to gather usage and configuration data for the application components. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)
A.en: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

B.zh: AWS Transfer Family
B.en: AWS Transfer Family

C.zh: AWS Application Discovery Service
C.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

D.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
D.en: AWS Global Accelerator

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS DMS 主要用于迁移数据库，而不是收集和传输应用程序组件的使用情况和配置数据。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DMS is primarily used to migrate databases, not to collect and transfer usage and configuration data of application components.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Transfer Family 用于通过 SFTP、FTPS 或 FTP 向 AWS 存储服务传输文件，不会发现应用程序组件的使用情况和配置。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Transfer Family transfers files to AWS storage over SFTP, FTPS, or FTP; it does not discover application-component usage and configuration.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Application Discovery Service 旨在协助企业在迁移到 AWS 之前收集应用程序组件的使用和配置数据。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The AWS Application Discovery Service is designed to help enterprises collect usage and configuration data of application components before migrating to AWS.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Global Accelerator 用于为全球用户优化网络性能，与应用程序迁移或数据收集和传输无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Global Accelerator is used to optimize network performance for global users and has nothing to do with application migration or data collection and transfer.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Application Discovery Service 旨在协助企业在迁移到 AWS 之前收集应用程序组件的使用和配置数据。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS Application Discovery Service is designed to help enterprises collect usage and configuration data of application components before migrating to AWS.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪一种设计原则符合 AWS Well-Architected Framework的性能效率支柱？
question_text.en: Which design principle aligns with performance efficiency pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework?

A.zh: 使用无服务器架构
A.en: Using serverless architectures

B.zh: 水平缩放
B.en: Scaling horizontally

C.zh: 衡量工作负载的成本
C.en: Measuring the cost of workloads

D.zh: 使用托管服务
D.en: Using managed services

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：无服务器架构可以显著提高性能效率，同时通过按需自动扩展和分配资源来减少管理开销。这是性能效率支柱的核心设计原则之一。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Serverless architecture can significantly improve performance efficiency while reducing management overhead by automatically scaling and allocating resources on demand. This is one of the core design principles of the Performance Efficiency Pillar.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：但不完整。水平扩展确实是性能效率的一部分，但它更关注弹性和可用性支柱，而不是性能效率的核心设计原则。乙。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: but not complete. Horizontal scaling is indeed part of performance efficiency, but it focuses more on the resiliency and availability pillars rather than the core design principles of performance efficiency. B (36%).

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这属于成本优化支柱的设计原则，与性能效率没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This belongs to the design principle of the Cost Optimization pillar and is not directly related to performance efficiency.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然托管服务可以简化管理并提高效率，但它们更关注卓越运营的支柱，而不是性能效率的核心设计原则。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While managed services can simplify management and increase efficiency, they are more focused on the pillars of operational excellence than on the core design principles of performance efficiency.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用无服务器架构

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (63%) B (37%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：无服务器架构可以显著提高性能效率，同时通过按需自动扩展和分配资源来减少管理开销。这是性能效率支柱的核心设计原则之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (63%) B (37%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Serverless architecture can significantly improve performance efficiency while reducing management overhead by automatically scaling and allocating resources on demand. This is one of the core design principles of the Performance Efficiency Pillar.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望为其世界各地的用户提供低延迟。 AWS 云的哪些功能符合此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to provide low latency to its users around the world. Which feature of the AWS Cloud meet this requirement?

A.zh: 全球基础设施
A.en: Global infrastructure

B.zh: 即用即付定价
B.en: Pay as-you-go pricing

C.zh: 托管服务
C.en: Managed services

D.zh: 规模经济
D.en: Economy of scale

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 的全球基础设施包括多个区域和边缘站点，通过它们可以将服务部署在距离用户最近的地方，从而减少延迟。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS's global infrastructure includes multiple regions and edge locations, through which services can be deployed closest to users, thereby reducing latency.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：按量付费定价是 AWS 的成本管理优势，与提供低延迟没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Pay-as-you-go pricing is a cost management advantage of AWS and is not directly related to providing low latency.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：托管服务是AWS提供的服务管理方式，可以简化用户操作，但与低延迟没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Managed services are service management methods provided by AWS, which simplify user operations, but are not directly related to low latency.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：规模经济主要是通过AWS的大规模运维来降低单位成本，并不能直接缩短全球用户的网络延迟。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Economies of scale mainly reduce unit costs through AWS's large-scale operations and cannot directly shorten network latency for global users.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 的全球基础设施包括多个区域和边缘站点，通过它们可以将服务部署在距离用户最近的地方，从而减少延迟。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS's global infrastructure includes multiple regions and edge locations, through which services can be deployed closest to users, thereby reducing latency.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 公司应该在 Amazon EC2 竞价型实例上运行哪种类型的工作负载？
question_text.en: Which type of workload should a company run on Amazon EC2 Spot Instances?

A.zh: 需要长时间使用特定 EC2 实例配置的稳态工作负载
A.en: A steady-state workload that requires a particular EC2 instance configuration for a long period of time

B.zh: 可中断且可控制成本的工作负载
B.en: A workload that can be interrupted and can control costs

C.zh: 不需要长期承诺的稳态工作负载
C.en: A steady-state workload that does not require a long-term commitment

D.zh: 不可中断、可控制成本的工作量
D.en: A workload that cannot be interrupted and can control costs

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：竞价型实例可能会中断，因此不适合需要长期稳定运行的工作负载。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Spot Instances can be interrupted, so they are not suitable for workloads that require long-term stable operation.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：竞价型实例的主要特点是成本低，但可能会中断，因此适合可以容忍中断的工作负载。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The main feature of Spot Instances is that they are low cost but may be interrupted, so they are suitable for workloads that can tolerate interruptions.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然不需要长期承诺，但 竞价型实例不适合通常需要连续运行且可能中断的「稳态工作负载」。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While no long-term commitment is required, Spot Instances are not suitable for "steady-state workloads" that typically require continuous operation and may be interrupted.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：竞价型实例可能会中断，因此不适合无法容忍中断的工作负载。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Spot Instances can be interrupted and are therefore not suitable for workloads that cannot tolerate interruptions.

answer_text.zh: B. 可中断且可控制成本的工作负载
answer_text.en: B. A workload that can be interrupted and can control costs

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：竞价型实例的主要特点是成本低，但可能会中断，因此适合可以容忍中断的工作负载。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The main feature of Spot Instances is that they are low cost but may be interrupted, so they are suitable for workloads that can tolerate interruptions.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有多个 AWS 账户。该公司需要从 AWS 收到合并账单，并且必须集中管理安全性和合规性。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 服务或功能来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company needs to receive a consolidated bill from AWS and must centrally manage security and compliance. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 成本与使用报告
A.en: AWS Cost and Usage Report

B.zh: AWS Organizations
B.en: AWS Organizations

C.zh: AWS Config
C.en: AWS Config

D.zh: AWS Security Hub
D.en: AWS Security Hub

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务用于生成详细的成本和使用情况报告，以帮助用户分析费用，但它不提供安全和合规功能的集中管理，因此不满足问题要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to generate detailed cost and usage reports to help users analyze expenses, but it does not provide centralized management of security and compliance functions, so it does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Organizations可让用户集中管理多个 AWS 账户，包括集成账单和设置服务控制策略 (SCP) 来管理安全性和合规性。完全符合题目的要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service allows users to centrally manage multiple AWS accounts, including consolidating billing and setting up Service Control Policies (SCPs) to manage security and compliance. Completely meets the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Config用于记录和审核资源配置更改，以协助用户确保资源符合合规性要求。但不涉及计费集成功能，因此不符合问题要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to record and audit resource configuration changes to help users ensure that resources meet compliance requirements. However, it does not involve the billing integration function, so it does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务用于集中检查和管理安全警报，以帮助提高安全性，但它不提供计费集成，因此不满足问题要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to centrally check and manage security alerts to help improve security, but it does not provide billing integration and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Organizations可让用户集中管理多个 AWS 账户，包括集成账单和设置服务控制策略 (SCP) 来管理安全性和合规性。完全符合题目的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service allows users to centrally manage multiple AWS accounts, including consolidating billing and setting up Service Control Policies (SCPs) to manage security and compliance. Completely meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: Amazon EC2 按需型实例对于哪些用例最具成本效益？
question_text.en: For which use case are Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances MOST cost-effective?

A.zh: 计算密集型视频转码，如有必要可以重新启动
A.en: Compute-intensive video transcoding that can be restarted if necessary

B.zh: 连续使用1个月进行品质保证测试的实例
B.en: An instance in continual use for 1 month to conduct quality assurance tests

C.zh: 运行将运行 1 年的 Web 服务器的实例
C.en: An instance that runs a web server that will run for 1 year

D.zh: 运行数据库的实例将运行 3 年
D.en: An instance that runs a database that will run for 3 years

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：- Bug：对于可以中断的计算任务，使用 竞价型实例更经济，因为 竞价型实例更便宜且适合非关键任务。按需型实例不适合这种场景。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: - Bug: For computing tasks that can be interrupted, it is more economical to use Spot Instances because Spot Instances are cheaper and suitable for non-critical tasks. On-Demand Instances are not suitable for this scenario.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：- 按需型实例最适合短期使用场景，例如持续一个月的品质保证测试。它提供灵活性，无需长期承诺。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: - On-Demand Instances are best suited for short-term usage scenarios, such as quality assurance testing that lasts a month. It offers flexibility without the need for a long-term commitment.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：- Bug：对于长期运行的实例（例如 1 年），预留实例或 节省计划 更具成本效益，因为它们提供折扣价格。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: - Bug: For long-running instances (e.g. 1 year), Reserved Instances or Savings Plans are more cost-effective because they offer discounted prices.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：- 对于长期运行的数据库实例（例如 3 年），预留实例或节省计划是更经济的选择，因为它们可以显著节省成本。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: - For long-running database instances (e.g. 3 years), Reserved Instances or Savings Plans are more economical options as they provide significant cost savings.

answer_text.zh: B. 连续使用1个月进行品质保证测试的实例
answer_text.en: B. An instance in continual use for 1 month to conduct quality assurance tests

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：- 按需型实例最适合短期使用场景，例如持续一个月的品质保证测试。它提供灵活性，无需长期承诺。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: - On-Demand Instances are best suited for short-term usage scenarios, such as quality assurance testing that lasts a month. It offers flexibility without the need for a long-term commitment.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司开发了一种新的内部应用程序。该公司无法确定或预测应用程序将创建的使用需求。公司正在寻求哪种 AWS 云计算优势？
question_text.en: A company has developed a new In-house application. The company does not have a way to determine or predict the usage demand that the application will create. Which AWS Cloud computing benefit is the company seeking?

A.zh: 易于使用
A.en: Easy to use

B.zh: 性价比高
B.en: Cost-effective

C.zh: 安全
C.en: Secure

D.zh: 可扩展且高性能
D.en: Scalable and high performance

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS确实好用，但这个问题的重点在于解决不可预测的使用需求，而不是平台的易用性。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS is indeed easy to use, the focus of this question is to solve unpredictable usage needs, not the ease of use of the platform.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：成本效益是 AWS 的优势，但它与解决不可预测的使用需求无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Cost effectiveness is an advantage of AWS, but it has nothing to do with addressing unpredictable usage demands.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全性是AWS的核心优势之一，但它与本问题所描述的需求无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Security is one of the core strengths of AWS, but it has nothing to do with the needs described in this question.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS的可可扩展性和高性能可以帮助企业应对不可预测的使用需求，并确保应用程序在任何负载下都能正常运行。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS's scalability and high performance can help enterprises cope with unpredictable usage demands and ensure that applications can run normally under any load.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS的可可扩展性和高性能可以帮助企业应对不可预测的使用需求，并确保应用程序在任何负载下都能正常运行。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS's scalability and high performance can help enterprises cope with unpredictable usage demands and ensure that applications can run normally under any load.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 产品可以分析公司的 AWS 环境以发现 Amazon EC2 实例上的安全漏洞？
question_text.en: Which AWS offering can analyze a company’s AWS environment to discover security vulnerabilities on Amazon EC2 instances?

A.zh: Amazon Inspector
A.en: Amazon Inspector

B.zh: Amazon Macie
B.en: Amazon Macie

C.zh: AWS Shield Standard
C.en: AWS Shield Standard

D.zh: 安全群组
D.en: Security groups

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一项自动化安全评估服务，可分析 Amazon EC2 实例的安全漏洞以及不符合最佳实践的情况。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that analyzes Amazon EC2 instances for security vulnerabilities and noncompliance with best practices.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Macie 主要旨在识别和保护敏感数据（例如 PII），而不是分析 EC2 实例的安全漏洞。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Macie is primarily designed to identify and protect sensitive data (such as PII) rather than analyze EC2 instances for security vulnerabilities.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield Standard 是针对 DDoS 攻击的保护服务，与 EC2 实例的安全漏洞分析无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Shield Standard is a protection service against DDoS attacks and has nothing to do with security vulnerability analysis of EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全群组是用来控制网络流量的防火墙规则，不具备分析安全漏洞的功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Security groups are firewall rules used to control network traffic and do not have the function of analyzing security vulnerabilities.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Inspector 是一项自动化安全评估服务，可分析 Amazon EC2 实例的安全漏洞以及不符合最佳实践的情况。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that analyzes Amazon EC2 instances for security vulnerabilities and noncompliance with best practices.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司计划招募将远程工作的新员工。公司需要构建Windows虚拟桌面，为新进员工打造一个工作环境。员工必须能够从任何地方使用电脑或网络浏览器访问工作环境。哪些 AWS 服务或功能可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to onboard new employees that will be working remotely. The company needs to set up Windows virtual desktops to create a working environment for the new employees. The employees must be able access the working environment from anywhere and by using their computer or a web browser. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 专用主机
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
B.en: AWS Global Accelerator

C.zh: Amazon WorkSpaces
C.en: Amazon Workspaces

D.zh: Amazon CloudFront
D.en: Amazon CloudFront

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专用主机 是用于配置物理服务器的专用主机，主要是为了满足合规性或授权要求。它不适合创建虚拟桌面环境，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: are dedicated hosts used to provision physical servers, primarily to meet compliance or licensing requirements. It is not suitable for creating virtual inspection environments, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项 Web 服务，可优化世界各地用户访问的应用程序的性能。与虚拟检测环境无关，因此AWS Global Accelerator 是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a web service that optimizes the performance of applications accessed by users around the world. It has nothing to do with the virtual inspection environment, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon WorkSpaces 是一项托管虚拟桌面服务，允许用户通过电脑或浏览器从任何地方访问其工作环境。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a hosted virtual inspection service that allows users to access their work environment from anywhere through a computer or browser. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是一种内容传递网络 (CDN) 服务，用于加速网站、视频和其他内容的分发。与虚拟检测环境无关，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a content delivery network (CDN) service used to accelerate the delivery of websites, videos, and other content. It has nothing to do with the virtual inspection environment, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon WorkSpaces 是一项托管虚拟桌面服务，允许用户通过电脑或浏览器从任何地方访问其工作环境。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a hosted virtual inspection service that allows users to access their work environment from anywhere through a computer or browser. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望可视化和管理特定时间内的 AWS 云成本和使用情况。哪些 AWS 服务或功能可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to visualize and manage AWS Cloud costs and usage for a specific period of time. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 成本管理器
A.en: Cost Explorer

B.zh: 合并账单
B.en: Consolidated billing

C.zh: AWS Organizations
C.en: AWS Organizations

D.zh: AWS Budgets
D.en: AWS Budgets

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Cost Explorer 是 AWS 提供的工具，用于可视化和分析 AWS 服务的成本和使用情况。支持按时间段查看成本趋势，并提供详细的报表功能，非常适合满足问题的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Cost Explorer is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing and analyzing the cost and usage of AWS services. It supports viewing cost trends by time period and provides detailed reporting functions, which is very suitable for meeting the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：合并账单是AWS Organizations的一项功能，用于将多个账户的账单合并到一个主账户中，以方便集中管理，但不提供可视化和分析功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Consolidated billing is a feature of AWS Organizations that is used to consolidate bills from multiple accounts into one master account to facilitate centralized management, but it does not provide visualization and analysis functions.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Organizations 是一项用于管理多个 AWS 账户的服务，支持账户分组和权限管理，但不直接提供成本可视化和分析功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Organizations is a service used to manage multiple AWS accounts and supports account grouping and permission management, but it does not directly provide cost visualization and analysis functions.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Budgets 用于设置成本或使用预算并提供警报功能，但不提供详细的成本可视化和分析功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Budgets is used to set cost or usage budgets and provides alerting capabilities, but it does not provide detailed cost visualization and analysis capabilities.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Cost Explorer 是 AWS 提供的工具，用于可视化和分析 AWS 服务的成本和使用情况。支持按时间段查看成本趋势，并提供详细的报表功能，非常适合满足问题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Cost Explorer is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing and analyzing the cost and usage of AWS services. It supports viewing cost trends by time period and provides detailed reporting functions, which is very suitable for meeting the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务支持 MySQL 数据库引擎？
question_text.en: Which AWS service supports MySQL database engines?

A.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
A.en: Amazon Dynamo DВ

B.zh: Amazon RDS
B.en: Amazon RDS

C.zh: Amazon DocumentDB（与 MongoDB 兼容）
C.en: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)

D.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
D.en: Amazon ElastiCache

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，不支持 MySQL 数据库引擎。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed NoSQL database service and does not support the MySQL database engine.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS（关系数据库服务）支持多种关系数据库引擎，包括 MySQL。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS (Relational Database Service) supports multiple relational database engines, including MySQL.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DocumentDB 是一种文档数据库服务，旨在与 MongoDB 兼容，不支持 MySQL。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DocumentDB is a document database service designed for compatibility with MongoDB and does not support MySQL.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ElastiCache 是托管缓存服务，支持 Redis 和 Memcached，但不支持 MySQL。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon ElastiCache is a managed caching service that supports Redis and Memcached, but does not support MySQL.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS（关系数据库服务）支持多种关系数据库引擎，包括 MySQL。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS (Relational Database Service) supports multiple relational database engines, including MySQL.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司为 AWS 云中的工作负载购买了 Amazon EC2 标准预留实例 (RI)。本公司需要将部分工作负载转移到与这些标准预留实例的实例系列不符的实例系列。公司如何运用不再需要的标准 RI？
question_text.en: A company purchased Amazon EC2 Standard Reserved Instances (RIs) for a workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to move part of the workload to an instance family that does not match the instance family of these Standard RIs. How can the company take advantage of the Standard RIs that it no longer needs?

A.zh: 联系 AWS Support 团队，并要求团队销售标准 RI
A.en: Contact the AWS Support team, and ask the team to sell the Standard RIs

B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 预留实例市场上销售标准 RI
B.en: Sell the Standard RIs on the Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace

C.zh: 作为第三方卖家在 AWS Marketplace 上销售标准 RI
C.en: Sell the Standard RIs as a third-party seller on the AWS Marketplace

D.zh: 将标准 RI 转换为 节省计划
D.en: Convert the Standard RIs to Savings Plans

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Support 团队无法直接协助客户销售标准预留实例。客户需自行在Amazon EC2预留实例市场上运行操作。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS Support team cannot directly assist customers selling Standard Reserved Instances. Customers need to perform operations on the Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace themselves.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon EC2 预留实例市场允许客户出售其他 AWS 用户不再需要的标准预留实例。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace allows customers to sell Standard Reserved Instances that are no longer needed to other AWS users.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Marketplace 是一个销售软件和服务的市场，而不是销售 EC2 预留实例的市场。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Marketplace is a marketplace for selling software and services, not for selling EC2 Reserved Instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：标准预留实例无法直接转换为 节省计划。 节省计划 是不同的定价模型，与预留实例没有直接的换算关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Standard Reserved Instances cannot be converted directly to Savings Plans. Savings Plans are a different pricing model and have no direct translation relationship with Reserved Instances.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 Amazon EC2 预留实例市场上销售标准 RI
answer_text.en: B. Sell the Standard RIs on the Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon EC2 预留实例市场允许客户出售其他 AWS 用户不再需要的标准预留实例。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace allows customers to sell Standard Reserved Instances that are no longer needed to other AWS users.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在发布一个关键业务应用程序。在发布之前，该公司需要AWS的策略规划协助。在发布期间，该公司需要AWS基础设施事件管理和实时支持。为了满足这些要求，公司该做什么？
question_text.en: A company is releasing a business-critical application. Before the release, the company needs strategic planning assistance from AWS. During the release, the company needs AWS infrastructure event management and real-time support. What should the company do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 访问 AWS Trusted Advisor
A.en: Access AWS Trusted Advisor

B.zh: 联系 AWS Partner Network (APN)
B.en: Contact the AWS Partner Network (APN)

C.zh: 注册 AWS 企业支持
C.en: Sign up for AWS Enterprise Support

D.zh: 联系 AWS 专业服务
D.en: Contact AWS Professional Services

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 是一个提供优化建议（例如成本优化、安全性、性能等）的工具，但它不提供策略规划或实时支持服务。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Trusted Advisor is a tool that provides optimization recommendations (such as cost optimization, security, performance, etc.), but it does not provide strategic planning or real-time support services.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：APN 是一个提供第三方解决方案和服务的 AWS Partner Network，但它不直接提供 AWS 策略规划或实时支持服务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: APN is an AWS partner network that provides third-party solutions and services, but it does not directly provide AWS strategic planning or real-time support services.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Enterprise Support 提供策略规划支持、AWS 基础设施事件管理 (IEM) 和实时支持服务，完全满足问题需求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Enterprise Support provides strategic planning support, AWS Infrastructure Event Management (IEM), and real-time support services, which fully meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 专业服务提供咨询服务来协助客户设计和实施解决方案，但不提供实时支持或事件管理服务。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Professional Services provides consulting services to help customers design and implement solutions, but it does not provide real-time support or incident management services.

answer_text.zh: C. 注册 AWS 企业支持
answer_text.en: C. Sign up for AWS Enterprise Support

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (75%) D (25%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Enterprise Support 提供策略规划支持、AWS 基础设施事件管理 (IEM) 和实时支持服务，完全满足问题需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (75%) D (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Enterprise Support provides strategic planning support, AWS Infrastructure Event Management (IEM), and real-time support services, which fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望通过为员工提供搜索问题和检索具体答案的方式来提高员工的工作效率。该公司希望使用单一的智能搜索接口。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to improve employee productivity by providing a way for employees to search for questions and retrieve specific answers. The company wants to use a single intelligent search interface. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Connect
A.en: Amazon Connect

B.zh: Amazon Kendra
B.en: Amazon Kendra

C.zh: Amazon Lex
C.en: Amazon Lex

D.zh: Amazon Comprehend
D.en: Amazon Comprehend

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一个以云为中心的解决方案，用于管理客户交互。它不适用于智能搜索接口，因此此选项可以。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a cloud-centric solution for managing customer interactions. It does not work with the smart search interface, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Kendra 是专为帮助用户快速搜索、查看相关信息而设计的智能搜索服务。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is an intelligent search service specially designed to help users quickly search and check relevant information. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Lex 是一个建构对话界面的服务，主要用于创建聊天机器人和语音助理。虽然它涉及自然语言处理，但它并不专注于搜索功能，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service for building conversational noodles, mainly used to create Gantian robots and voice assistants. Although it involves natural language processing, it does not focus on search functionality, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Comprehend 是一种自然语言处理服务，用于分析文本情绪、截取关键字等。它不提供搜索功能，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a natural language processing service used to analyze text sentiment, extract keywords, and more. It does not provide search functionality, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (83%) A (17%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Kendra 是专为帮助用户快速搜索、查看相关信息而设计的智能搜索服务。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (83%) A (17%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is an intelligent search service specially designed to help users quickly search and check relevant information. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要一种 Amazon S3 解决方案，以个位数毫秒延迟访问对象。哪种解决方案可以满足要求？
question_text.en: A company wants an Amazon S3 solution that provides access to object storage within single-digit milliseconds. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: S3 Express One Zone
A.en: S3 Express One Zone

B.zh: S3 Standard
B.en: S3 Standard

C.zh: S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval
C.en: S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval

D.zh: S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval
D.en: S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：S3 Express One Zone 是高性能的单可用区 S3 存储类别，可为延迟敏感型应用程序提供个位数毫秒的数据访问。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: There is no storage class named "S3 Express One Zone" in Amazon S3. Cup options may be misleading or misspelled.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Standard 提供低延迟访问，但 S3 Express One Zone 专为要求个位数毫秒延迟的高性能工作负载而设计。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The S3 Standard storage class provides high availability and low latency (access time per second), which is suitable for frequently accessed data.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval 面向归档数据，检索通常需要数分钟到数小时，不能满足要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval is mainly used for return data. The access delay is usually a few minutes to a few hours, which does not meet the requirements of single-second access.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval 支持毫秒级检索，但 S3 Express One Zone 是题目所述高性能、个位数毫秒访问场景的对应方案。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval provides sub-second access, it is mainly used in return data and cost optimization scenarios rather than standard object storage scenarios.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (58%) B (42%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：S3 Express One Zone 是高性能的单可用区 S3 存储类别，可为延迟敏感型应用程序提供个位数毫秒的数据访问。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (58%) B (42%). Popular discussion and key point summary: There is no storage class named "S3 Express One Zone" in Amazon S3. Cup options may be misleading or misspelled.
